title: DISCOVERY 2 — Spot through the kitchen window
prompt: Medium two-shot in @kitchen at the window, soft daylight from outside. @Sara on the LEFT lowers @ipad and points through the glass with wide eyes. @Papa on the RIGHT leans in beside her, jaw dropping. Sara: "Papa, look outside!" Papa: "Oh my goodness — what is happening out there?!" Through the window glass, soft-focus, a small white-and-tan jack russell can be seen far away digging in the flowerbed. Cheerful surprised mood.
